title: What are Components?
description: Understand the two types of components: function and class.

slides.title: Two Flavors of Components 🍦

quizData.question: Which of the following is a valid functional component?
quizData.explanation: Option 1 is a standard function returning JSX. Option 2 is missing a `return`. Option 3 is a class but not extending React.Component. Option 4 is an assignment without `const/let` but would work if declared properly, but it's not the cleanest syntax.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Which One to Use?

Start with functional components. They are simpler, and you can use Hooks for state and side effects. Only use class components if you're maintaining legacy code.
